goal: Apply the V9 Mineral Aesthetic (Black Jade & Gold Silk, Aged Ivory, Lapis Lazuli, Malachite, Cinnabar) to all secondary screens and panels (StoryScreen, BattleArena, Modals, ResultScreen, CharactersView) to ensure visual consistency and premium feel.
constraints: Use V9 Mineral Palette: Aged Ivory (#f6e4c3), Lapis Lazuli (#1e3a5f), Malachite (#064e3b), Cinnabar (#831843), Polished Jade (#e7e1f0).
Replace hardcoded red/gold with the new mineral palette.
Implement ink-wash textures and gold-leaf filigree borders (Silk-woven borders).
Ensure all buttons use the V9 Command Library terminology (宣篇, 定谳, 辍笔, 承运).
Do not modify the initial interface background/layout of MainMenu, only the interactive sub-elements.
